raw:
{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.4": 4, "R1.7": 2, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Names prior work (CalibVar-v1) and articulates deltas in performance.",
    "R1.7": "Flags missing citations for established baselines in missense pathogenicity prediction.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for some claims, particularly regarding the novelty of the approach.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly covers the requested scope (evaluating a calibrated variant-pathogenicity model).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions identified; focuses on potential harms related to overconfidence in predictions.",
    "RX.5": "Does not provide traceability for the suggestions made."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.4
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Names prior work (CalibVar-v1) and articulates deltas in performance.
rationale.R1.7: Flags missing citations for established baselines in missense pathogenicity prediction.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for some claims, particularly regarding the novelty of the approach.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly covers the requested scope (evaluating a calibrated variant-pathogenicity model).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified; focuses on potential harms related to overconfidence in predictions.
rationale.RX.5: Does not provide traceability for the suggestions made.
